name: TensorPM v1.8.9-beta.1 (Beta)
body:
# Changelog - v1.8.9-beta.1

## New Features

### Automatic intake relevance check

TensorPM can now pre-check incoming connector emails for spam or project
relevance before the Distiller starts processing them.

**What Changed:**

- Added an opt-in setting for automatic intake relevance checks
- Incoming connector emails can be checked in the background with the existing
  Distiller pre-check
- Irrelevant or spam-like emails move to the Ignored list instead of being
  permanently rejected
- Ignored auto-filtered emails show the model-provided reason and can be
  restored anytime
- Restored emails get a durable override so they are not auto-filtered again

**User Benefit:**
The Distiller queue stays cleaner without hiding what happened. Auto-filtered
emails remain visible, explainable, and reversible.

### Optional AI-created item tagging

AI-created tasks and categories can now be tagged with `[AI]` only when the user
explicitly enables it.

**What Changed:**

- Added a setting for tagging newly AI-created tasks and categories
- Action item generation, splitting, MCP-created tasks, A2A-created tasks, and
  category generation now respect the setting
- Existing titles and existing tags are not changed

**User Benefit:**
Users who want explicit AI provenance can keep it, while users who prefer clean
task titles can turn the tagging off.

## Bug Fixes

### Safer Distiller pre-check handling

Pre-check verdicts no longer hard-reject intake signals.

**What Changed:**

- Pre-check spam and not-current-project verdicts now move signals to the
  Ignored list
- The full Phase 1 Distiller check can still reject when it compares the whole
  message content
- Signals currently claimed by the Distiller are excluded from background
  relevance checks
- A second claim-state check runs before storing a background verdict
- The per-project background-check cap now leaves remaining work queued instead
  of immediately draining the same project again

**User Benefit:**
Cheap pre-checks are now reversible, while the stricter main Distiller decision
path remains available for real rejections.

## Improvements

### Better intake visibility

The Ignored intake view now identifies automatically filtered emails and shows
the reason when available.

**User Benefit:**
Users can quickly understand why an email was filtered and restore it if needed.

## Notes

- This is a beta release for users on the beta update channel.
- The full Playwright E2E suite is intentionally skipped for this release;
  type checks, lint, unit tests, and the release AI smoke test remain enabled.

---

## Release Info

- **Version**: 1.8.9-beta.1
- **Release Date**: 2026-06-07
- **Previous Version**: 1.8.8-beta.1
- **Type**: Patch (Beta) Release
